In the domain, the predicate candidate_created, candidate_prepared, etc are defined for candidate_entity, so these origin and destination availability objects are also candidate_entities. So they can be used in actions that require candidate_entity. Also they are used in actions like create_candidate, allocate_vehicle_unit, etc. So we need to treat them as candidates.
